title: Ciudad Guayana, F — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Ciudad Guayana is a city in F with a population of 800,000. A planned industrial city on the Orinoco River, home to Venezuela’s steel and aluminum industries.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
